title: Avoid shifting ints and longs by zero or more than their number of bits-1
description: Shifting ints and longs by more than their number of bits can lead to unexpected results. For ints, shifting by more than +/-31 is confusing at best and an error at worst. For longs, shifting by more than +/-63 is similarly problematic.
recommendation: Avoid shifting ints and longs by zero or more than their number of bits-1.
impact: Potential for unexpected results and runtime errors.

checks.message: Avoid shifting ints and longs by zero or more than their number of bits-1.
